name: bowtie-studio-pro
description: Professional bowtie diagram modeling tool for HSE and critical processes
author: PULSO-AI <contacto@pulso-ai.com>

scripts.build:vercel: vite build -c vite.vercel.config.ts && vite build -c vite.client.vercel.config.ts
scripts.build:netlify: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && vite build -c vite.netlify.config.ts && vite build -c vite.client.config.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build:netlify && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist --functions=netlify/functions
scripts.deploy:vercel: npm run build:vercel && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt
scripts.respaldar: git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "chore: respaldo $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin HEAD)
